name: T.Kawabe & Co., Ltd.
summary: T.Kawabe & Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, imports, and exports handkerchiefs, scarves, mufflers, towels, and fabric products in Japan. The company also processes, imports, exports, and sells chemical textile and general textile products, textile fabric, clothing accessories, upholstery, furniture, and bedding products. In addition, it is involved in clothing design, and planning and consulting of interior decoration; sale, lease, and intermediation of the real estate properties; and manufacture and sale of cosmetics, perfumes, soaps, and pharmaceutical and non-pharmaceutical products. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. As of January 25, 2021, T.Kawabe & Co., Ltd. is subsidiary of ICHIHIRO CO.,LTD.
